creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Danilo,

Thank you for the work you are doing.

I think the issue you are seeing is with py-cryptography being too old.  I am following bug 254853 closely, but this needs to go in so that it will support the newer version of py-cryptography when it lands.  If you apply the patch to update py-cryptography it should work.


Regards,
Brad Davis
